updates.2026-04-10: Meetings have been constructive and approaching the final stages. I have received a lot of support which is much appreciated. If you haven't already, please consider sending a short email to our new DFO in support of the app. Every email counts. I'm hopeful a big show of support may help push it through. Thank you.

updates.2026-04-05: There have been active discussions with the airline over the past few months and I've proposed a number of different solutions to address their concerns. I'll be sure to share further updates if there is any meaningful progress.

updates.2026-01-23: Discussions remain ongoing and constructive. Thank you for your patience.

updates.2025-12-16: Discussions with the airline are ongoing.

updates.2025-12-12: A meeting with the airline has been scheduled for early next week.

updates.2025-12-05: The airline has been contacted to resolve any concerns regarding the app.

updates.2025-12-04: Live access is temporarily unavailable due to an access restriction imposed by the airline.
